alkylation reagent: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature
cleavage agent: Samples were digested using 1:20 (enzyme:substrate) ratio of bovine trypsin
fractionation method: GFP-TRAP complexes were fully resolved on a SDS PAGE gel
instrument: using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (ThermoFisherScientific, United Kingdom)
ionization type: The eluate was ionized by electrospray ionization
